blockers.description: Subagent worktree mode fails when Bash tool requires explicit user approval — executor agents cannot commit or run tests
blockers.workaround: Execute plans inline (sequential, no subagents) when worktree mode is blocked

decisions.decision: Subagent worktrees are blocked by Bash permission checks
decisions.rationale: Agent cannot run git commit or pytest without user approving each Bash call
